messages.text: Knowing that my husband is unwell while away makes his wife's heart truly heavy.❤️
But please, husband, stay strong and keep in mind that we will be getting married as soon as we reunite.🌎❤️
Husband’s health is more important to his wife than anything else in the world.❤️
Please take your medicine regularly, get plenty of rest, and focus on a speedy recovery.❤️
Don't feel lonely, husband, because your wife is always right there with you in spirit. 🎁
Please come back to me soon; your wife will always be waiting for you.💖
HBD to my partner in crime! 🥂
Another year of bad decisions together. 😂
